name: wool_result_marks
description: Two iconographic Wool Crush result marks in one family. SUCCESS: a neat rainbow yarn ball completely wound into a radiant rosette, two knitting needles crossed behind it, with one large sparkle. FAILURE: the same yarn ball unraveled into a loose tangled knot with one bent needle and a small drooping strand.
prompt_extra: same yarn colors and chunky silhouette in both cells; emotional state reads without faces or text; transparent background; no cat or dragon mascot

variants.name: plush
variants.prompt_extra: soft plush wool fibers and warm highlights

variants.name: graphic
variants.prompt_extra: bolder simpler shapes with very clear wound-versus-tangled contrast
